a.xlink:title: sqrt is provided by fl::sqrt overloads in math.h for:
Inject a shaped bump. Multiple triggers per frame accumulate additively.
Render particle with sub-pixel accuracy and power-modulated color.
Update position based on velocity × power.
Rescale raw inoise16() output to full 16-bit range [0, 65535] Curries in the global NOISE16_EXTENT_MI...
